name: North Cascade Heli
description: Our location in the northeast corner of the Cascade Range is a unique combination of longitude, latitude and altitude, giving us some of the finest snow conditions for heli-skiing on Earth. With helicopter Landing Zones above 8,000 feet, our guests enjoy consistently fresher, drier powder snow far away from crowded ski resorts. North Cascade Heli will offer 26/27 Indy Passholders 15% off 2-day trips and 10% off 1-day trips for Heli Skiing and Heli-Assisted Touring. 2-Day trips do not need to be on consecutive days. No blackout dates, but bookings are subject to availability. This offer is also valid for current 25/26 Indy Passholders through March 29, 2026.
